episodes.title: We Grew Up in a Cult. This Is Where It Begins. | Ep.01
episodes.description:
Blooped's 1st Live: From Cultic Upbringing to Collective Liberation with Vanessa and Vilas
__________________________________________________________________________________________

We walked out of hell and never looked back. Now, we’re building the rooms where women can finally exhale.

Welcome to Blooped—the podcast for women who’ve walked out of cults and high-control systems and no longer agree with playing small. From periods to politics, power to personal autonomy, friends and fellow survivors Vanessa & Vilas explore the radical act of disagreement and non-tolerance for systems of abuse. 

Real stories. Brave conversations. Zero Kool-Aid.

Join us LIVE every Wednesday at 4pm on Substack or on Apple an Spotify. 

Have a story to share, message us at bloopedpodcast@haregmail.com Subject: Share my Story. 

Don't forget to subscribe to our channel, and follow us on substack: https://thebloopedpodcast.substack.com
